productDisplayName: John Miller Men Striped Purple Shirt
description: Composition Purple and white striped shirt made of a cotton blend fabric, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron directly on decoration This shirt from john miller adds a fresh twist to everyday formal clothing with its breathable fabric and fashionable cut. Look dapper in this beautifully designed shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and offers a flattering silhouette. Pair it with formal pants, leather shoes and classy accessories. Model statistics Product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
